current_baseline_2026-04-27.denominator_disambiguation: raw 95 line 2131 reads compliance-organic = (organic_passing + advisory_exempt) / total_active_rules_in_raw_and_own. Under that formula: (2+41)/125 = 0.344. The user's 2.4% number uses organic_passing / (active - exempt) = 2/(125-41) = 2/84 = 0.0238. BOTH numbers are real; raw 95 spec uses the 0.344 number for the 0.60 falsifier comparison.
current_baseline_2026-04-27.gap_to_60pct: (0.60 * 125) - (2 + 41) = 75 - 43 = 32 more rules need passing OR exempt within 28 days
current_baseline_2026-04-27.gap_to_95pct: (0.95 * 125) - (2 + 41) = 119 - 43 = 76 more rules need passing OR exempt within 88 days
